calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-04-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Ashok Thapa Respondent/Plaintiff appeared in pro per.
Navin Hemrajani appeared on behalf of Appellant/Defendant California Parking Systems Inc. in pro per.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Respondent/Plaintiff Ashok Thapa testifies on his own behalf.
Mr. Hemrajani testifies on behalf of Appellant/Defendant California Parking Systems Inc.
Witness for Plaintiff/Respondent Bimala Thapa testifies.
Witness for Plaintiff/Respondent Santoss Boudel testifies.
Witness for Defendant/Appellant Hector Castro testifies.

The following documentary evidence is introduced:
Respondent/Plaintiff's Exhibit 1: Photocopy of business card.
Respondent/Plaintiff's exhibits are retained by the Court.
The matter is taken under submission.
Judge Quinn addresses Mr. Hamrajani regarding the possibility of holding him in contempt of court. Mr. Hamrajani apologizes to the court.
Dept. 608; Judge: Joseph Quinn; Clerk: J. Bertelsen; Not reported.

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Apr-04-2019 Set For Trial On Apr-04-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 608

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-04-2019 Continued To Apr-04-19 At 09:15 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Navin Hamrajani, General Manager, for California Parking Systems, Inc., appellant/defendant;
Ashok Thapa, for respondent/plaintiff, is also present.

This case comes on calendar regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

The parties would not stipulate to the Judge Pro Tem. The matter is transferred to the Master Calendar Department, Dept. 206, for reassignment.

Judge Pro Tem: Elliott Myles; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 525.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Feb-06-2019 Judgment Entered

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Dec-17-2018 Continued To Feb-05-19 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 506
